problem id: c30a782a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) AND NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  00101001 -> 00100101
  00101111 -> 00000101
  01000010 -> 01001000
  10010011 -> 01000010
  00111000 -> 00000111
  00001011 -> 01000001
  11110110 -> 10011110
  01011011 -> 01001011
  10111001 -> 00100111
  01100011 -> 01001100

query: 00110011
predicted answer: 01000110
